channel.title: Blogs on Vighnesh Nilajakar
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on Vighnesh Nilajakar

item.title: Installing Windows
item.author: vighneshnilajakar2@gmail.com (Vighnesh Nilajakar)
item.description: Introduction It's an Unfortunate Event but it has happened, I have Installed Windows 10 😔. Destroying all my FOSS Principles, I installed this Proprietary piece of Software. Just for all the Normies who will be reading these Blogs 😢, also to see how an Optimized Version of Windows works in Comparision to Linux 😅.
item.dc:creator: Vighnesh Nilajakar
